name: google-gmail
description: Read, search, and send emails from your Gmail account
long_description:
Full Gmail integration for Chitty Workspace. Read your inbox, search emails with Gmail query syntax, and send messages — all through natural language.

**Reading** — List recent inbox emails, search with powerful Gmail queries (from:, subject:, has:attachment, etc.), read full email threads with decoded content.

**Sending** — Compose and send emails, reply to existing threads with proper threading. Validates recipients and protects against header injection.

Authentication uses Google OAuth. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keyring.

**Security** — Uses Python's email package for RFC 2822 message generation (no string concatenation). Validates email addresses, sanitizes headers, and uses minimal OAuth scopes (readonly + send, no modify).

auth.instructions: This package uses Google OAuth to access your Gmail account. You'll authorize Chitty Workspace to read and send emails on your behalf.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.help_text: Installs the Chitty SDK which handles authentication and API helpers.

setup_steps.label: Connect to Google account
setup_steps.help_text: Click 'Connect' to authorize Chitty Workspace to access your Gmail. A browser window will open for Google OAuth authorization.

feature_flags.label: Allow reading email content
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can read full email bodies. When disabled, only metadata (subject, from, date) is accessible.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to read the full content of your emails.

feature_flags.label: Allow sending emails
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can compose and send emails from your Gmail account.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to send emails from your Google account.

agent_config.default_instructions: You have access to Gmail tools. Always show email content to the user before sending. Never send an email without explicit user confirmation. When listing emails, show metadata first (subject, from, date) and let the user choose which to read in full. When composing replies, show the draft for approval before sending.
suggested_prompts: Draft a reply to the last email about the project update
capabilities: List recent inbox emails with metadata
Search emails with Gmail query syntax
Read full email content and threads
Send new emails with recipient validation
Reply to existing email threads with proper threading
